description: Public API network directory for discovering community collections, workspaces, and APIs

novel_features.name: Canonical collection lookup
novel_features.description: One command finds the best community Postman Collection for a vendor, ranked by publisher verification, fork count, and recency.

novel_features.name: Trend ranking by custom metric
novel_features.description: Rank entities by any metric (weekForks, monthViewCount, etc.) with category and entity-type narrowing.

novel_features.name: Publisher gravitas (cross-team comparison)
novel_features.description: Aggregate fork counts across every entity per publisher within a category; rank teams by total community gravity.

novel_features.name: Updated-within-window drift
novel_features.description: Report locally synced entities whose API-side updatedAt timestamp falls inside a time window.

novel_features.name: Verified publishers only
novel_features.description: When passed --verified-only, the browse command filters to entities owned by publishers with the verified-team flag set.

novel_features.name: Fork velocity (accelerating collections)
novel_features.description: Rank collections by acceleration ratio: (weekForkCount × 4) / monthForkCount. Surfaces collections breaking out before they top the popular list.

novel_features.name: Similar collection finder (more-like-this)
novel_features.description: Given an entity numeric id, return collections with overlapping name, summary, and category — ranked by FTS relevance score against the seed entity's text.

novel_features.name: Category landscape report
novel_features.description: For a category slug, return: total entity counts per type, top 5 publishers by aggregate fork count, and top 5 entities by viewCount. One command, one structured payload.
